headlines.title: Trump says he’s not thinking about Americans’ finances ‘even a little bit’ in Iran talks
headlines.description: President Donald Trump told reporters on Tuesday that he is not weighing the economic burden of the Iran war on everyday Americans when negotiating a deal with the country’s leadership

headlines.title: Democrats pick Nebraska Senate nominee who could drop out and back independent Dan Osborn
headlines.description: Cindy Burbank won the Democratic Senate primary in Nebraska, NBC News projects, potentially clearing the way for independent Dan Osborn to take on GOP Sen.

headlines.title: Trade, Taiwan and Iran cast shadows on Trump’s China summit with Xi
headlines.description: President Donald Trump will begin a two-day summit with Chinese President Xi Jinping in Beijing on Thursday as the two countries engage in a fierce trade war and the U.S. conflict with Iran rages on.

headlines.title: Police received threat against Georgia candidate for governor ahead of bomb scare at campaign event
headlines.description: Brad Raffensperger, Georgia’s secretary of state, has faced threats after publicly disputing President Trump’s false claims that he won the state in 2020.

headlines.title: Longtime ICE official David Venturella chosen to head agency
headlines.description: Longtime ICE official David Venturella has been chosen to lead the immigration agency after its former acting director’s departure was announced last month, a Department of Homeland Security spokesperson said.

headlines.title: Political drama unfolding in the UK that may lead to Prime Minister Starmer being ousted
headlines.description: British Prime Minister Keir Starmer pushes back against fellow Labour Party members calling for his resignation after disastrous local election results. NBC News’ Raf Sanchez reports from London.

headlines.title: Trump heads to high-stakes summit in China
headlines.description: President Trump has left for Beijing and a high-stakes summit with China’s President Xi. NBC Nightly News anchor Tom Llamas is there.

headlines.title: Hallie Jackson interviews former FBI Director James Comey
headlines.description: Former FBI Director James Comey says he will "stand up and defend himself" after he was indicted over a photo of seashells which showed the numbers "8647." Comey tells NBC News' Hallie Jackson that a justice system based on retribution is "not American."

headlines.title: The cage match is on for tickets to Trump’s UFC fight at the White House
headlines.description: 4,000-plus spectators who are lucky enough, cunning enough or rich enough will score a seat to the UFC fight on the South Lawn next month.

headlines.title: How the White House Correspondents’ Association dinner chaos unfolded
headlines.description: Secret Service faced challenges evacuating President, Vice President, Cabinet officials and Congressional leaders after gunman rushes D.C. gala.

headlines.title: Appeals court pauses Trump’s $83 million payment to E. Jean Carroll pending Supreme Court action
headlines.description: Carroll didn’t object to the pause as long as certain conditions were met. The ruling puts the payment on hold until the Supreme Court either reviews the case or decides to pass on it.

headlines.title: South Carolina Senate rejects effort to tackle redistricting despite pressure from Trump
headlines.description: The Republican-led South Carolina state Senate rejected a measure to take up a redraw of the state’s congressional map despite pressure from President Donald Trump.
